'''dhanïfrïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeibekiko|zeibekiko]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeibekiko|zeibekiko]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dhanïfrïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhænïfrïfth || dhænïfrïfj || dhænïfrïfsh || dhænïfrïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhanïfnïfrïfth || dhanïfnïfrïfj || dhanïfnïfrïfsh || dhanïfnïfrïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhanïfrïfth || dhanïfrïfj || dhanïfrïfsh || dhanïfrïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhanïffrïffth || dhanïffrïffj || dhanïffrïffsh || dhanïffrïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhanïfrïfïf || dhanïfrïfïf || dhanïfrïfïf || dhanïfrïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhanïfrïfth || dhanïfrïfj || dhanïfrïfsh || dhanïfrïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhanïfrïfïfl || dhanïfrïfïfl || dhanïfrïfïfl || dhanïfrïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhanïfrïfïfïf || dhanïfrïfïfïf || dhanïfrïfïfïf || dhanïfrïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhanïfrïfïfn || dhanïfrïfïfn || dhanïfrïfïfn || dhanïfrïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhanïfrïfïforo || dhanïfrïfïforo || dhanïfrïfïforo || dhanïfrïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d34c0b6}}
